title: Brands pay. You don't.
subtitle: A self-sustaining loop where advertising funds free access to essential products — no charity box, no coin slot.

steps.title: Brands buy ad space
steps.desc: Partners advertise on our 32-inch HD screens and product packaging, reaching a highly relevant audience.

steps.title: Ad revenue funds products
steps.desc: Every campaign pays for the supply, stocking and maintenance of free period products.

steps.title: Products reach people, free
steps.desc: Plastic-free, biodegradable pads and tampons — available exactly when and where they're needed.
